remarks: Fountain Terrace gated community with guard-controlled entry serving both buildings. Spacious 2BR unit offering excellent storage, an oversized living room with access to a covered patio, separate dining area, kitchen & full bath. Generous layout with great natural light and flexible living space. Basement amenities include common laundry & fitness room; outdoor pool located nearby. Heat & hot water are included in the monthly HOA. Sale is subject to DSS & Probate Court approval, including an appeal period, and is being sold strictly As-Is. Please review all attached rules, regulations, and resale requirements prior to submitting. Investor guidelines apply: unit must be owner-occupied for the first year and may require contribution to the association. Association approval required for new buyers. Parking space does NOT convey; new owner must apply through management. A second space may be available for an additional monthly fee, subject to availability. Most contents may remain with the unit. Buildings 71 & 91 are managed separately; 77 Fountain oversees shared grounds and parking assignments. Association retains right of first refusal.
